title: tribulus longipetalus var. mollis
intro: Tribulus longipetalus var. mollis, also known as Chinese Caltrops or soft-fruited Tribulus, is a plant species belonging to the family Zygophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as improving cardiovascular function, reducing blood pressure, and enhancing kidney function, as well as possessing anti-cancer properties. Tribulus longipetalus var. mollis is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
